title: Manonmaniam Sundaranar University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
short_info: Manonmaniam Sundaranar University (MSU) Project Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on 13 May 2026 on the official website of Manonmaniam Sundaranar University. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the MSU Project Assistant Recruitment 2026.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Manonmaniam Sundaranar University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 03-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Manonmaniam Sundaranar University Project Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Project Assistant position at Manonmaniam Sundaranar University is 03-06-2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a First Class in M.Sc. Chemistry to be eligible for the Project Assistant position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 25,000 per month.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications need to be submitted offline by post. You should download the form, fill it, and send it to the specified address before the deadline.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Assistant post will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: Q7. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is CMRG250654/PA/ADV-I/2026.

faq.question: Q8. In which city is the Manonmaniam Sundaranar University located?
faq.answer: Manonmaniam Sundaranar University is located in Tirunelveli, Tamil Nadu.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job opportunity at Manonmaniam Sundaranar University.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section on this page, labeled as 'Official Notification PDF'.
